summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Competition Stage Override + Motivation v2 feature. All backend unit tests (19/19), guard tests, regression tests, and frontend UI tests passed successfully.
passed_tests: Backend: pytest 19/19 tests passed in services/test_match_stage_detector.py
Backend: _apply_stage_correction guard correctly moves finals from discarded_motivation to discarded_market
Backend: _apply_stage_correction guard rewrites 'motivación normal' reasons for finals/knockouts
Frontend: intelligence.js exports PRESSURE_STATES with 5 keys (FINAL, KNOCKOUT_HIGH_PRESSURE, LEAGUE_URGENCY, NORMAL_LEAGUE, LOW_STAKES)
Frontend: MotivationContextBlock accepts pressureState prop and renders pressure badge correctly
Frontend: Motivation state badge renders with correct data-testid and data-state attributes
Frontend: Pressure state badge only renders when pressureState is not NORMAL_LEAGUE (correctly hidden for normal league matches)
Frontend: MatchDetailPage passes pressure_state to MotivationContextBlock (line 151)
Code Review: MOTIVATION_RULES_V2 contains 'COMPETITION STAGE OVERRIDE — NO NEGOCIABLE' section
Code Review: _build_prefilter_prompt() prevents DISCARD for finals/knockouts
Code Review: _build_system_prompt() includes 'REGLAS DE MERCADOS PROTEGIDOS PARA FINALES Y KNOCKOUTS'
Code Review: _hydrate_team_news respects INJURY_SOURCES_ENABLED flag (disabled by default)
Code Review: _select_candidates applies +5 viability boost to finals/knockouts to survive cap
Code Review: normalizer.summarize_match_for_llm includes stage info (competition_stage, pressure_state, is_final, etc.)

success_percentage.backend: 100% (all unit tests, guard tests, and regression tests passed)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (UI components render correctly, badges display as expected)

notes: As per main agent's instructions, did NOT call /api/analysis/run with refresh=true to avoid consuming LLM credits
Did NOT test injury_sources scraping (rotowire/sportsgambler/promiedos) as INJURY_SOURCES_ENABLED=false by default
Verified via synthetic test that the guard correctly handles the exact scenario reported by user (SC Freiburg vs Aston Villa - Europa League Final)
All 8 test cases from the feature spec (A-H) are covered by the 19 unit tests in test_match_stage_detector.py
Frontend pressure badge correctly hidden for normal league matches (Superliga) and only shows for finals/knockouts
Backend API regression tests confirm no breaking changes to existing endpoints
